title: Developer Tools
subtitle: View app logs, system details, and common troubleshooting actions
hero: This page keeps the current app state visible so you can investigate issues, prepare feedback, or verify local changes.
disabled_desc: Turn on Developer Mode in Settings before opening this page.
system_desc: Basic runtime information for this device and app.
logs_desc: Recent app logs refresh automatically for troubleshooting.
logs_filtered_empty: No logs match the current filters.
actions_desc: Keep common troubleshooting and test actions in one place.
system_tools_desc: Copy this device summary before reporting an issue.
update_test_desc: Check whether a specific update package can be downloaded normally.
crash_test_desc: This immediately triggers a crash so you can confirm crash logs are generated.
crash_test_unavailable: This action is only available in local development builds.
